minute.description: Minute field of cron expression, range 0-59, supports step values with /

hour.description: Hour field of cron expression, range 0-23, supports step values with /

day_of_month.description: Day-of-month field, range 1-31, supports lists, ranges, and step values

month.description: Month field, range 1-12 or three-letter abbreviations JAN through DEC

day_of_week.description: Day-of-week field, 0 and 7 both represent Sunday, supports abbreviated names

command.description: Shell command to execute when the time matches all five fields
